title: Ginger
description: Fight dry flakes with our fresh ginger, anti-dandruff shampoo! Made with sea salt and salicylic acid, this nourishing shampoo promotes a balanced, healthy scalp.
ingredients: Zingiber Officinale Root Extract (Fresh Ginger Root Extract)
Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract (Fresh Rosemary Extract)
Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil (Organic Argan Oil)
Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit Oil (Bergamot Oil)

images.alt: Ginger. A smudged swatch of thick, textured, bright orange hair shampoo.

The image shows the model's arms stretched into the centre holding the white, LUSH Version-themed packed pot of the Ginger shampoo. One of their hands is scooping the product out. There is a teal background.
The model is standing under running shower water on a teal background. Their dark, long hair is wet and lathered in suds as they lather the Ginger shampoo into their roots.

The image shows the rear view of the model's dark, long hair which is wet and lathered in suds as they lather the Ginger shampoo into their roots. There is a teal background with running shower water.
The model is standing under running shower water on a teal background. Their dark, long hair is wet and lathered in suds as they lather the Ginger shampoo into their roots.
The model is on a teal background with a contrasting, yellow and orange gradient tank top. They have thick, shoulder-length hair which looks clean and healthy and is being fanned with air.
